response.justification: Strong fullstack background with 10+ years of experience spanning Node.js, TypeScript, React, and MongoDB — directly matching the primary stack. Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, aligning with the AI agent requirement. Solid track record with TDD, CI/CD, and cross-language work (Java, DLang, C++). Some gaps around Nest.js and Kotlin specifically, and heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less time on the exact target stack.
strengths: 10+ years fullstack with TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB matching primary stack
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq fits the agent requirement
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops/teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being a primary stack item
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience appears dated (pre-2018)
Significant time invested in DLang ecosystem rather than the target TS/Node stack
